author: gb9t
content:
Added grsec/PaX as a project-level security reference (user pointer 2026-05-09):

- Reference catalog: .design/references/grsec-pax-notes.md (PAX_* + GRKERNSEC_* features, mapped into 'free in Rust' / 'type-system encodable' / 'explicit per-subsystem policy' buckets)
- Knowledge page: 'grsec-pax-notes' (tags: reference, security, backlog)
- 00-overview.md gains Q6: confirms recommendation to author 00-security-principles.md as a deferred foundational doc, after Phase A and mm/arch overviews land
- Tracking: issue #2 'Author 00-security-principles.md grounded in grsec/PaX catalog', blocked by #1

Source patch on disk at /home/doll/grsec-6.6.102.patch (14 MB, 4808 files, against linux-6.6.102 — slightly older than our 7.1-rc2 baseline; still the most current freely-available grsec).
